Notes: Goldey-Beacom's 2nd win in last 3 games ... Bloomfield's 4th straight loss ...
Goldey-Beacom ties school record with 6th straight conference win ... Devonne
Richardson becomes 2nd player in GBC history to reach 1,000 career rebounds
Game.Officials: John Fitzpatrick (R),  Rich Coleman,  John Sanjurjo
